name: Forgotten Hill: The Wardrobe 5
author: Poki
description: The Wardrobe is about to be reopened, but this time by someone with a plan to stop it... Forgotten Hill: The Wardrobe 5 is the latest terryifying point-and-click game from the Wardrobe series! Get ready to face new nightmares, explore the darkest recesses of the Wardrobe and solve all the puzzles that will try to block your path. Each puzzle has some hints that can assist you in finding the answer if you are feeling stuck. Will you finally be able to stop the horror of the wardrobe? And above all, will you survive? How do I play Forgotten Hill: The Wardrobe 5? Use your mouse to click on objects of interest, and collect items in your inventory to assist you in solving devious puzzles. Left Mouse Button: Click (and drag) to interact with objects of interest. Who created Forgotten Hill: The Wardrobe 5? Forgotten Hill: The Wardrobe 5 is created by FM Studio. Play their other games on Poki: Forgotten Hill: The Wardrobe , Forgotten Hill: The Wardrobe 2 , Forgotten Hill: The Wardrobe 3 , Forgotten Hill: The Wardrobe 4 , Forgotten Hill Memento: Playground , Forgotten Hill Memento: Love Beyond , Forgotten Hill Memento: Buried Things , Forgotten Hill: Puppeteer , Forgotten Hill: Fall , Forgotten Hill: Surgery , Little Cabin in the Woods and Pixel Volley ! How can I play Forgotten Hill: The Wardrobe 5 for free? You can play Forgotten Hill: The Wardrobe 5 for free on Poki. Can I play Forgotten Hill: The Wardrobe 5 on mobile devices and desktop? Forgotten Hill: The Wardrobe 5 can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
